title: Faculty
intro: Working professionals who love to teach.

content.p: Every Étoile instructor is a credentialed, actively performing or recently retired professional. Below is our current roster; hover a class on the Classes tab to see who teaches it.

ul: Mme. Camille Laurent — Artistic Director, Cecchetti-certified, 18 years with the National Ballet.
Mr. Daniel Okafor — Ballet, former soloist, Royal Academy of Dance registered teacher.
Mme. Irina Ivanova — Ballet & Variations, Vaganova Academy graduate.
Ms. Sofia Reyes — Jazz, Broadway national tour credits.
Mr. Marcus Delacroix — Tap, two-time regional tap champion.
Ms. Amara Bello — Contemporary, MFA in Dance, resident choreographer.
Ms. Priya Nair — Ballet accompanist and music theory.
Mr. Leo Fischer — Conditioning & injury prevention, licensed PT.
Ms. Grace Tan — Petite division lead, early-childhood dance specialist.
Mr. Elias Ward — Boys' program, athletic movement coach.
Ms. Hannah Brooks — Pointe specialist and fitting consultant.
Mme. Yvette Dubois — Repertory and audition coaching.
Ms. Nadia Petrova — Stretch & strength, former rhythmic gymnast.
Mr. Theo Almeida — Partnering and pas de deux.
Ms. Bianca Ricci — Costume design and stagecraft.
Mr. Samuel Cohen — Lighting and production mentor.
